text.title: JPA/Hibernate Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce an entity + narrow repository + transactional service.

step.name: design-entity
step.action: Define `@Entity` with `@Id`, audit timestamps (`@CreationTimestamp`/`@UpdateTimestamp`), `@Version` if mutable. For each association add Javadoc justifying cascade + orphanRemoval + fetch choice.
step.decision-gate: If any association uses `CascadeType.ALL` without justification, FAIL.

step.name: osiv-off
step.action: Set `spring.jpa.open-in-view: false`. Add CI check that fails if the property is missing or set to true.

step.name: narrow-repository
step.action: Define narrow interface `OrderRepository` listing only used methods. If dynamic filtering needed, also extend `JpaSpecificationExecutor<Order>` on a separate interface.

step.name: dto-projections-for-reads
step.action: Define interface or class projections for list endpoints. Repository methods return `List<OrderDto>` via `@Query("SELECT new ...OrderDto(o.id, o.total) FROM Order o")` or interface projection.

step.name: transactional-service-with-joinfetch
step.action: Service uses `@Transactional(readOnly=true)` on read methods, `@Transactional` on writes. Eager loads use `JOIN FETCH` repository methods. Returns DTOs, not entities.
step.decision-gate: If service returns an entity, FAIL — wrap in DTO.
